gt_sql: SELECT t1.birthday FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.birthday
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
ORDER BY pa.overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: When is the birthday of the football player who has the highest overall rating?
